repo.name: Tasker
repo.description: Repository for direct-purchase version of tasker.  an application for Android which performs tasks (sets of actions) based on contexts (application, time, date, location, event, gesture)  in user-defined profiles or in clickable or timer home screen widgets.  https://tasker.joaoapps.com/ NOTE: Tasker is a closed source and requires a purchased license to work.

apps.description: Scan, create, and manage barcodes and QR codes with Tasker integration for seamless automation.
apps.name: AutoBarcode

apps.description: Automate your device's user interface with Tasker integration, enabling clicks, swipes, text input, and more for seamless automation.
apps.name: AutoInput

apps.description: Launch apps, shortcuts, and activities with Tasker integration and advanced options for automation.
apps.name: AutoLaunch

apps.description: Advanced location-based triggers and geofencing with Tasker integration for powerful automation.
apps.name: AutoLocation

apps.description: Create, intercept, and customize Android notifications with advanced buttons, replies, and triggers for powerful Tasker automation.
apps.name: AutoNotification

apps.description: Share content between apps, devices, and the web with Tasker integration and advanced sharing options for automation.
apps.name: AutoShare

apps.description: A powerful suite of tools and plugins for Tasker, enabling advanced automation with UI customization, file management, and more.
apps.name: AutoTools

apps.description: Tasker is an application for Android which performs tasks (sets of actions) based on contexts (application, time, date, location, event, gesture)
apps.name: Tasker
